plugins.name: integrate-claudecode
plugins.description: Integrate Claude Code into a Docker/VSCode Devcontainer project.

plugins.name: sdd-setup
plugins.description: Skills and a builder agent for scaffolding AI-driven development containers: create projects, add Claude Code, Beads, and OpenSpec. Skills generate project-specific Dockerfiles, devcontainer.json, and lifecycle scripts.

plugins.name: sdd-workflow
plugins.description: Full lifecycle spec-driven development for AI agents: interactive planning, JIRA integration, bead graph generation, parallel implementation with review gates, and spec completion auditing.
